jobs.name: Nightly session cleanup
jobs.description: Clean up idle subagents (3+ hours) and direct sessions (1+ day)

payload.message: Run session cleanup: openclaw sessions cleanup --enforce

jobs.name: cleanup-old-subagent-sessions
jobs.description: Delete subagent tasks and sessions older than 3 hours with succeeded status

payload.message:
Run this command to clean up old subagent sessions:

bash /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/cleanup-old-subagents.sh

Then report back with the output and any errors.

jobs.name: sync-openclaw-config-hourly
jobs.description: Commit and push openclaw config changes to GitHub every hour

payload.message:
Run the openclaw config sync script:

bash /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/sync-openclaw-config.sh

Report the output. If there is nothing to commit, that should not be considered a failure.

jobs.name: Airplane Live Tour Monitor
jobs.description: Check airplanelivetour.com hourly for new tour dates/cities

payload.message:
Run the airplane tour monitor:

python3 /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/check-airplane-tour.py

The script handles all output and Telegram notifications directly. Do not report anything.

jobs.name: UTR Availability Monitor
jobs.description: Check Ubiquiti Travel Router availability hourly

payload.message:
_Note: This cronjob needs to run with haiku or better; deepseek will not work._

Check for availability of the Ubiquiti Travel Router.  Here are the steps:

1. Check the availability state from the last run.
2. Update the state by checking the output of the following shell command: `curl https://store.ui.com/us/en/category/wifi-special-devices/products/utr | html2text`
   a. If the output contains `Sold Out`, then the device is sold out.
   b. If the output contains `Add to Cart`, then the device is available.
   c. If neither of those conditions exist, then there was probably an error in fetching the page.  Wait five minutes and try again.
3. If the state has changed, then send a notification.
4. Update the state so that it can be checked in the next run.

jobs.name: Beverly rate limit check
jobs.description: Check if Beverly can authenticate after Telegram rate limit expires

payload.message: Check if Beverly (scambaiter) can authenticate now that the Telegram rate limit has expired. Scale the deployment back to 1 replica and verify the pod starts successfully. Check logs to confirm 'ScamBaiter running' message appears.
